M-076.NAME: premium-admin-cockpit
M-076.path: frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/StatCard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProto.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProtoAnalytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Servers.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Plans.tsx docs/plans/Phase-58.xml docs/plans/Phase-62.xml scripts/phase58-premium-admin-cockpit-smoke.mjs scripts/phase62-compactness-deletion-smoke.mjs
M-076.owns: Premium compact admin cockpit for service health, users, devices, MTProto, tariffs, analytics, and operations.
M-076.purpose: Make admin operations scan-friendly and premium without reducing emergency control clarity.

exports.view-admin-command-home: Dense health, revenue, user, VPN, MTProto, and action summary.
exports.view-admin-inventories: Searchable compact users/devices/proxy lists with bounded scrolling and filters.
exports.view-admin-mtproto-ops: Redacted MTProto operations and analytics with confirmation-safe actions.
exports.rule-admin-deletion-audit: Remove bulky, duplicated, or low-value admin panels while preserving operations.

constraints.constraint-1: Admin emergency actions, destructive confirmations, and audit-sensitive feedback must remain visible.
constraints.constraint-2: MTProto tags, secrets, full links, raw tokens, and high-risk identifiers must remain redacted.
constraints.constraint-3: No backend API, auth/session, deploy, install, or runtime changes are included.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Frontend-admin build and premium admin smoke pass.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Static route proof verifies bounded inventories and reduced-motion markers; authenticated phone/tablet screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Deletion audit preserves user/device/MTProto/tariff/analytics workflows and remains Phase-62 scope.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-06-04 pass-local: frontend-admin Layout, StatCard, Dashboard, Users, Devices, MTProto, MTProtoAnalytics, Analytics, Servers, Plans, shared admin CSS, and Phase-58 smoke were updated for premium command center, bounded inventories, MTProto redaction, confirmation guards, tariff readonly guard, analytics readonly guard, reduced-motion proof, and protected-surface isolation.
evidence.evidence-2: Verification passed: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase58-premium-admin-cockpit-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase42-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase43-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase50-tariff-catalog-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase55-premium-art-direction-smoke.mjs; XML parse; mygrace lint; git diff --check; protected backend/deploy/runtime/frontend-user guard.

M-076.hotspot: H-063: Premium admin cockpit must improve scanability without hiding emergency controls, MTProto redaction, or confirmation flows.
